original_hypothesis.title: Unbounded protocolFeePercent Can Make Sells Impossible Due to Underflow
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: Cred.setProtocolFeePercent has no upper bound validation. The owner can set protocolFeePercent to any value, including >10000 (>100%). When combined with creator royalties (up to 50%), the sell payout formula (price - protocolFee - creatorFee) underflows, causing all sell transactions to revert and permanently trapping curator funds.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: In _handleTrade for sells: curator_.safeTransferETH(price - protocolFee - creatorFee). If protocolFee + creatorFee > price, this underflows and reverts (Solidity 0.8 checked arithmetic). Unlike setProtocolFee in PhiFactory (which has a 10_000 cap), Cred.setProtocolFeePercent has no cap.

proof_of_signal.pattern: setProtocolFeePercent(uint256 protocolFeePercent_) external onlyOwner — no upper bound check

preconditions: Owner sets protocolFeePercent to a value where protocolFee + creatorFee > price
Curators hold shares they want to sell

initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: Compare with PhiFactory.setProtocolFee which has 'if (protocolFee_ > 10_000) revert'

analysis_questions: At what protocolFeePercent value do sells start reverting?
Can curator still sell via batch functions to bypass?
Is the owner a multisig that mitigates this risk?
validation_requirements: Set protocolFeePercent to 5000, combined with 5000 sellShareRoyalty, attempt sell

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: 1. Owner (compromised or malicious) sets protocolFeePercent to 6000 (60%). 2. Cred with sellShareRoyalty = 5000 (50%). 3. Total fees = 110% of price. 4. All sell transactions revert due to underflow. 5. All curator shares permanently locked.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: All curator funds locked across all creds using the affected bonding curve
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Owner must lower protocolFeePercent to restore sells

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for extreme protocolFeePercent values

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
